---
title: "Henry Hucks Gibbs, 1st Lord Aldenham"
---

## Henry Hucks Gibbs, 1st Lord Aldenham

**Dates:** (1819-1907)

### Description

cousin of CMY, philologist

### Biography

He was created (1896) 1st Lord Aldenham.  He married (1845) Louisa Anne Adams (d. 1895).  He was son of George Henry Gibbs (1785-1842), elder brother of William Gibbs of Tyntesfield.  His parents were first cousins, his mother being Caroline, sixth daughter of the Rev. Charles Crawley (1756-1849), Rector of Stowe Nine Churches, Northants., and Mary Gibbs (d.1819).  He was thus CMY’s second cousin. [ODNB, PB 1952]

### Letters

- Letter from April 21st [1893]
- Letter from [February 1885]
- Letter from May 19th [1871]
- Letter from Aug 13th [1865]
- Letter from Aug 3 1864
- Letter from July 25th [1864]
- Letter from July 12th [1864]
- Letter from July 30th [1863]
- Letter from July 25th [1863]
- Letter from Decr 10th 1861
- Letter from Novr 25th 1861
- Letter from April 16th 1860
- Letter from Novr 24th 1858

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
